headline: Does Strong Q1 EPS Beat And Buybacks Change The Bull Case For Expeditors (EXPD)?
summary: Earlier this week, Expeditors International of Washington reported first-quarter 2026 earnings per share of US$1.71, exceeding analyst expectations and reflecting year-over-year growth, while emphasizing the resilience of its non-asset-based logistics model amid industry disruptions. Management also stepped up share repurchases, signaling a continued preference for buybacks as a primary tool for distributing excess capital to investors. Next, we’ll examine how Expeditors’ stronger earnings...
